positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical cosmic mandalic pattern, embodying celestial bodies, nebulae, and interwoven geometric constellations. The design must feature intricate linework resembling neo-traditional tattoo art combined with modern cosmic geometry. Utilize a high contrast palette of deep indigo, rich violet, electric cyan, and matte gold accents. The composition must be centered, clean, and perfectly balanced, suitable for a direct apparel print. Focus on sharp edges, smooth gradients, and repeating, harmonious elements. Minimalist yet complex, optimized for graphic printing.
negative: blurry, low resolution, grainy, noisy, artifacts, text, words, signature, watermark, logo, cartoon, anime, bokeh, blur, messy, bad composition, bad anatomy, extra limbs
